title: overheal totem
description: An item that makes you invincible. Not even the void will stand a chance!
body:
An item that makes you invincible! Crafted from 3 compresed netherite blocks 1 totem of undying 4 nether stars and a dragon egg. even the void won't stand a chance!


It works by giving you a LOT of hearts so your visibility will be impaired, think of it as a balancing
